title: vitis vulpina
intro: Vitis vulpina, also known as the sand grape or winter grape, is a species of grapevine native to North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vitis vulpina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Vitis vulpina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
